<?php namespace Illuminate\Routing\Exceptions; use RuntimeException; class BackedEnumCaseNotFoundException extends RuntimeException { /** * Create a new exception instance. * * @param string $backedEnumClass * @param string $case */ public function __construct($backedEnumClass, $case) { parent::__construct("Case [{$case}] not found on Backed Enum [{$backedEnumClass}]."); } }
